data.title: record-test-status.sh discovers __pycache__/*.pyc files as test files causing false test failures
data.description: When tests/scripts/__pycache__/ contains .pyc files, record-test-status.sh discovers them as test files and attempts to run them, producing false failures. The .pyc files are pytest compilation artifacts. Fix: record-test-status.sh should exclude __pycache__ directories from test file discovery.
